Developer said it was fixed, but it's not.  Main menu, option menu and Multiplayer doesn't work.  I'm either stuck in the hallway or forced immediately into a single player game.  Also, why is the pitcher on the same team as me?  Overall, not worth $30.

developer_response.body: Hi tygerdad.2023, apologies that you are having trouble with the game!  We recommend first ensuring that your game is updated to the latest version.  Is it possible your online connection dropped while in the tutorial hallway?  We would be happy to help troubleshoot your specific situation, as we are not aware of any widespread issues, you can contact us at homerunderbycs@mlb.com.  PS- the pitcher is on your team because this is the Home Run Derby, he wants you to smash as many dingers as you can!

reviews.review_description: Awesome game who ever says no is just mad for no reason since I go it its been a great game very accurate and very fun 👍 😀 I love it

Incredibly shallow. All you do is swing a bat. That’s it. This feels like the sort of thing that would’ve been a tech demo in the infancy of VR, just to give a taste of the potential.  
There are also some obvious bugs that should’ve been fixed long ago… for example, some menus get clipped off-screen if you open them in the hallway; and the bat sometimes jumps into your other hand for unknown reasons during your at-bat.  Maybe there’s an option to lock it?  If so, wasn’t obvious. 
And as far as comfort, with the way a headset is front-weighted, leaning into a batting stance can get your neck very sore, very quickly. But since there’s not much to keep you here beyond a few swings just to try it out, I guess that doesn’t matter.

I downloaded the game and when I ended up picking a team it brought me to a hallway. I tried moving around and I couldnt. I was stuck in this hallway not being able to do anything. I deleted the game and reinstalled it but still had the same issue. BE WARNED BEFORE YOU BUY OR DOWNLOAD IT.

developer_response.body: Hello Rednck1208, we are so sorry that you were having trouble with the game!  We found and resolved a minor server issue over the weekend that disrupted a small number of players.  We invite you to give HRDVR another shot now and let us know what you think!  If you run into any other problems or need any additional support, contact us at homerunderbycs@mlb.com!

reviews.review_description: Lots of em

Its fun, but i think it could be more realistic. I think that the pitches are a little slow as a rising freshman baseball player even on the hard mode or whatever its called. If yall could make a simulation of what an mlb at bat could be like i would use that so i can train a little and that would also help me mentally because then i could see the diffrence between what i face and what they face.

Let me preface this with the fact that I'm not a baseball fan. But standing in the batter's box and swinging for the fences is pretty darn fun! I totally appreciate what the devs have created here. Great lobby and unlockables. It's home run derby, not sure why the bad reviewers are so confused 🤔

This is a simple enjoyable game😊 Yes it is easy to hit home runs but not always. I understand why serious baseballers poo poo the game, this isn’t designed for them. I’m older and retired and this game brings me back to my competitive baseball and softball days. I love plug and play games especially when you’re short on time. With a VR bat you get a workout in and it keeps you limber for golf.

I previously had some challenges with Home Run Derby not working as expected. I reached out to the devs and they provided a quick and detailed reply. 

My first attempt playing Home Run Derby resulted in it not working at all. The pitcher wouldn't pitch and when I wasn't in-game, I couldn't navigate the clubhouse. This has now been resolved. Ultimately, the issue was Home Run Derby not having an adequate internet connection to function. As soon as I tried the game again in a room closer to my router, it worked perfectly. 

(I should note that during my initial attempt at playing, the Meta Quest 3 did indicate that it was connected to a network and receiving internet, but clearly it wasn't a strong enough connection.)

With all that said, the game is now working as expected and during my time with it so far, I've enjoyed it. 

Huge thanks to the devs for providing support!

developer_response.body: Happy to help Axcalibur, and thanks for updating- we're excited that you're now able to enjoy the game!

reviews.review_title: Wow! I’m the greatest batter EVER!!!
reviews.review_description: I had no idea I was such a natural. I barely twitched my wrist and I think I just broke the world record! Which kinda makes the game very very boring. There is zero skill here. If you hit the ball as soft as you can and barely more your arm you will likely still hit the moon! I wanted to love this but it’s just pathetically easy, which makes it extremely dull to play. It feels good to whack a few home runs but with absolutely zero skill required it get very boring very fast. The only thing that keeps you playing is trying to hit the multiplier targets. Also… I’ve never played baseball but it feels like ever pitch is crazy low?! Is that normal? Most balls are around my knees, and balls should never be that low. Pun not intended.

developer_response.body: Hello Katumi74, we appreciate your review!  We wanted to let you know that there IS a difficulty setting you can change which tunes some of the items you mentioned: in the "Options" menu (the toolbox on the far right of the table in the clubhouse) under "Game Settings" you can choose a "Difficulty" setting of either "Normal" or "Pro" ("Normal" is the default setting).  Feel free to contact us at homerunderbycs@mlb.com if you need any additional support!

reviews.review_title: Swing a bat - again and again
reviews.review_description:
I suppose if you are a baseball fan and appreciate playing in all the different stadiums, then you might enjoy this game more.

However, to me it was just repetitive and boring. You swing a bat, you hit the ball, rinse and repeat. It doesn't even take any skill to hit a home run. There's simply nothing that would keep me entertained for longer than a few minutes the first time, or come back another time.
i picked my team and i picked if i bat left or right. then i'm stuck in the hallway i can't anywhere else

People say it’s like a batting cage, it’s not really to be honest. The game will obviously make it seem like you hit the ball stupidly hard and make the hit box on the ball a lot bigger than the ball, therefore it’s obviously very inaccurate. I got it free on meta+, so I thankfully didn’t waste any money on this. the graphics are meh, the gameplay loop is HORRIBLE (duh), and the fun is meh. I’m not really into baseball though. Maybe it’ll be fun for a person who actually enjoys it, not likely though. I personally wouldn’t waste $30 on it, it’s more like a $5-10 game.

There is no decent baseball game on the Quest. This game had the chance to be great but the developers seem to have mailed it in and have given us the bare minimum. The graphics are Playstation 1 quality and you are locked into nothing but a timed event. I get that it's called Home Run Derby for a reason, but a game priced this high should have more. They could have added other games like putting targets on the field in various places that we have to try to hit. Once you get your launch angle and swing right you can be like a machine hitting them out each time. There was no thought into having different types of pitches to fool batters or make it more interesting. Just everything down the middle. It's fun for about an hour. 

The two updates that have been released were essentially bug fixes so it seems these developers have no plans to give us more features and game modes. Even with a referral code, this game's cost is too high. For what you get, this game should be $9.99 max.

First of all, I love playing this game, it's alot of fun but the graphics are just terrible. I have a Vive headset and I play the steam version of this game with it and the graphics are really good but the meta release is just bad simple as that. I still plan on playing it, I just hope the graphics get updated

reviews.review_title: This is a good game when I can play
reviews.review_description:
Play experience is decent.
But UX is horrible.
I don’t know the exact way to start a game.
Pulling a Trigger just shows a stage but never start a game.

I can start a game when an accident by smashing buttons.

Please fix basic UI/UX problem.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for leaving us a review, sorry to hear that you’re getting stuck before getting into a round.  

To start a game:
1) Select the “Play” menu (the center object on the desk in front of you that looks like a model of a ballpark)
2) Select “Single Player” from the next menu
3) Use the arrows to select which ballpark you’d like to play in.  
4) Under the image of the ballpark, you should see a green “Enter” button that will bring you to the ballpark for a round of Home Run Derby!

Also: make sure you have completed the short tutorial.  Once you do, clubhouse navigation opens up tremendously!  Feel free to contact us at homerunderbycs@mlb.com if you need any additional support!

reviews.review_description: Very comfortable but very easy to hit home runs  very satisfying!

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to drop in a review.  Have you tried the “Pro” difficulty setting under the Options menu?

reviews.review_title: A good start, but could use adjusting
reviews.review_description: I'm not sure if developers scan the reviews but I'll weigh in. I've seen better graphics but so far the closest thing I'll ever get to hitting bombs over the Green Monster in Fenway Park. The flight of the ball off the bat way too fast and feels unrealistic. There is a limited amount of time to swing for the fences which kinda blows. It would be way more fun if you had a batting practice mode where you can take unlimited swings and maybe try to hit curveballs and 100mph heaters with movement. Or maybe even has a scenario mode of fictional  or maybe actual historic scenerios where it's the bottom of 9th inning with runners on base and Ortiz gets up against Rivera. A lot of potential here but few suggestions would make this game so much more fun.
I love this game its fun and realistic

This App is great, and a ton of fun to hit Homers in all 30 MLB parks!  This makes me excited for the potential of full MLB games on Oculus. 

Suggestions for improvement:  

1). There should be an Arcade mode (in which the ball flies off the bat, like it currently does), and a Simulation mode (in which the ball reacts closer to a real MLB baseball off the bat).  Example - homers shouldn’t get out of the park in 1-2 seconds, and rocket liner-homers shouldn’t happen nearly as often as they do in the current game;  the ball currently leaves the park way too fast, it should be on more of a realistic trajectory and time-line).  

2).  The late/early swing timing needs work at times;  from RH batter, sometimes early swings cause a severe foul ball to RF stands (foul), and that doesn’t make sense from a physics standpoint.

3).  The park perspective sometimes feels slightly off.  Batting in Fenway, for example, it feels as if I could throw a ball and hit the light towers on top of the LF Green Monster wall — the wall/lights feel a bit close.  Don’t get me wrong, LOVE the real parks, home plate perspective and looks/feels great, but the wall and the light towers just feel a tad close.  Additionally, in Fenway and Wrigley (and maybe others), from home plate the batter cannot see most of the fans in the Upper Deck behind the plate and infield because the stands are angled backward too much - fans/batter would be able to see each other.  Again, these are very SMALL quibbles, just pointing out some things if you’re looking for perfection.  

4).  Bat seems to be small and thin, should be like a nice, thick MLB bat barrel.  

5).  Announcer makes incorrect calls often. 

Despite those things, EXCELLENT game, hope you guys keep at it because this has HUGE potential.
Been stuck in the lobby at a desk all day never even got to the field how do you play the game this is nuts

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you for checking out the game, but very sorry to hear about the issue you’re experiencing.  It sounds like you are still in the tutorial- one of the interactive elements on the table in front of you (either the ballpark or the batter’s helmet depending on how far into the tutorial you are) should say “Pull Trigger to interact” and that should get you moving.  Feel free to contact us at homerunderbycs@mlb.com, we’ll be happy to provide any further assistance!
